revision_note: Reopened to fix ACL guest-mode bypass (req 2.4a) and align /vault.git with the standard apps/app middleware composition (req 11). Reverse-proxy Basic-auth coexistence (req 2.6) resolved by reusing PR #11244's X-GROWI-ACCESS-TOKEN header + extractAccessToken (arrives via master -> dev/8.0.x -> feat/growi-vault), with git-native Basic as fallback.
